title: examples/feature-lab/ sandbox
summary: A tiny non-game sandbox under examples/feature-lab/ whose only job is to lock the engine vertical: one parent-child rig (M16), one Pickable entity (M18), one Tween (M19), one ParticleEmitter preset (M19), one Persisted block (M4), one repeated-entity instancing group (M17). Playtest robot asserts each feature is wired. Not a game, just a regression target — keeps Beacon World focused on multiplayer gameplay and stops AGF samples from cloning idler/garden patterns from other engines' demos.
notes: Auto-migrated from HIGH_LEVEL_BACKLOG.md → "Roadmap Epics" table on 2026-05-18.
